requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs IEC 62196 Type 2

summary.en: Where Timor-Leste projects specify IEC-aligned EV charging equipment, AC chargers should be configured for IEC 62196-2 Type 2. Timor-Leste domestic domestic power outlets (Type C/F/I) are common for household and light industrial loads, while public EV charging should follow the project owner's EV interface specification or vehicle fleet profile. In IEC-direction projects, Type 2 physical compatibility is a practical requirement for vehicles using the IEC connector ecosystem.
summary.zh: 在东帝汶项目指定IEC体系电动汽车充电设备时，交流充电桩应配置IEC 62196-2 Type 2。东帝汶日常供电常见使用Type C/F/I家用或工商业插座，但公共电动汽车充电更多应由项目业主接口需求或车队车型来确定。任何IEC方向项目中，Type 2物理兼容性是适配欧洲IEC接口体系车辆的实际要求。
summary.zht: 在東帝汶項目指定IEC體系電動汽車充電設備時，交流充電樁應配置IEC 62196-2 Type 2。東帝汶日常供電常見使用Type C/F/I家用或工業插座，但公共電動汽車充電更多應由項目業主接口需求或車隊車型來確定。任何IEC方向項目中，Type 2物理兼容性是適配歐洲IEC接口體系車輛的實際要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1 — EV conductive charging system general requirements
IEC 61851-23 — DC electric vehicle supply equipment

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and China DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers with GB/T 27930 CAN communication. GB/T AC connector geometry and signaling differ from IEC Type 2, and GB/T DC is physically different from CCS2. GB/T connectors are therefore not plug-compatible with IEC 62196 Type 2 vehicles or charging infrastructure.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，中国直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器并配套GB/T 27930 CAN通信。GB/T交流接口的几何结构和信号方式与IEC Type 2不同，GB/T直流接口与CCS2物理形态不同。因此，GB/T接口无法与IEC 62196 Type 2车辆或充电基础设施插接兼容。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，中國直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器並配套GB/T 27930 CAN通訊。GB/T交流接口的幾何結構和訊號方式與IEC Type 2不同，GB/T直流接口與CCS2物理形態不同。因此，GB/T接口無法與IEC 62196 Type 2車輛或充電基礎設施插接兼容。

gap.en: A China GB/T-only charger needs hardware redesign for IEC 62196 Type 2 use: coupler, cable assembly, inlet or socket, locking, PP/CP signaling, OCPP-ready communication stack where required, labels, temperature-rise evidence, spare parts, and project documentation. Adapter-based claims should not be treated as equivalent to a project-compliant connector design. The required connector must be confirmed against the specific Timor-Leste vehicle fleet or tender before quoting.
gap.zh: 仅支持中国GB/T接口的充电桩如需用于IEC 62196 Type 2项目，必须进行硬件重新设计：耦合器、电缆组件、插座或车辆端接口、锁止、PP/CP信号、项目要求时的OCPP通信栈、标签、温升证据、备件和项目文件。转接器方案不应被视为等同于项目合规接口设计。报价前必须根据东帝汶具体车队或招标文件确认所需接口。
gap.zht: 僅支持中國GB/T接口的充電樁如需用於IEC 62196 Type 2項目，必須進行硬體重新設計：耦合器、電纜組件、插座或車輛端接口、鎖止、PP/CP訊號、專案要求時的OCPP通訊棧、標籤、溫升證據、備件和項目文件。轉接器方案不應被視為等同於項目合規接口設計。報價前必須根據東帝汶具體車隊或招標文件確認所需接口。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where IEC 62196 Type 2 is specified by the Timor-Leste project owner, vehicle fleet, or charge-point operator; GB/T substitution is physically incompatible
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 Type 2 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GB/T connector compliance does not make a charger Type 2-ready. For Timor-Leste IEC-direction projects, Type 2 conversion is a physical connector, signaling, and communication redesign that must be confirmed against the actual vehicle fleet or tender.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GB/T接口合规不代表充电桩已适配IEC 62196 Type 2。对于东帝汶IEC方向项目，Type 2转换是物理接口、信号和通信重新设计，必须根据实际车队或招标文件确认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GB/T接口合規不代表充電樁已適配IEC 62196 Type 2。對於東帝汶IEC方向項目，Type 2轉換是物理接口、訊號和通信重新設計，必須根據實際車隊或招標文件確認。
